name: Pear Avocado Mousse
recipeIngredient: 2 Very ripe pears, peeled and chopped
1 Very ripe avocado, peeled, seeded and chopped
2 tbsp Spiced or plain dark rum
1/2 cup Chopped peanuts or macadamia nuts
recipeInstructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor and puree for approximately 1 minute. Pour the pureed mixture into a glass dessert dish or parfait glasses and chill in the refrigerator for at least an hour. Garnish with mint sprigs and serve cold.
